name: Multiple Threats Detected on Same Host (by Machine Identifier)
notes: This rule triggers when multiple threats have been detected on the same host.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Endpoint Protection Devices, BB:DeviceDefinition: IDS / IPS
when at least 5 events are seen with the same Machine Identifier (custom) and different Threat Name (custom) in 30 minutes
thresholds: when at least 5 events are seen with the same Machine Identifier (custom) and different Threat Name (custom) in 30 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Multiple Threats Detected on Same Host (by Machine Identifier) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Endpoint Protection Devices, BB:DeviceDefinition: IDS / IPS
AND when at least 5 events are seen with the same Machine Identifier (custom) and different Threat Name (custom) in 30 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Multiple Threats Detected on Same Host (Machine ID)
Event description: Multiple threats have been detected on the same host.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
